overall.description: A cinematic walkthrough of a grand gothic great hall from a video game, featuring floating candles, an enchanted ceiling displaying a night sky, and students seated at long dining tables. The camera slowly moves through the central aisle as characters occasionally walk through the foreground.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic great hall with floating candles and long dining tables

agents.ego_description: slowly walking down the central aisle of the great hall, observing the floating candles and students at tables

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes walking briskly from right to left across the foreground at approximately 6 seconds

entered.detail: hundreds of lit candles floating in mid-air beneath the enchanted ceiling
large cylindrical stone column supporting the vaulted ceiling
long wooden tables lined with students and lit candelabras
large stone fireplace with burning fire on the left wall
tall gothic arched windows with colored glass panels
ceiling showing night sky with clouds and stars
stone wall decorated with hanging tapestries and portraits

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a vast gothic great hall illuminated by hundreds of floating candles beneath an enchanted ceiling showing a night sky. The camera walks slowly down the central aisle between long dining tables where students are seated. A student in dark robes crosses the foreground from right to left. The hall features massive stone pillars, a large fireplace on the left wall, and stained glass windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: central aisle of great hall approaching the far end

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk forward through the central aisle, passing between the dining tables

notable_agents.action: student walking from right to left across the foreground at approximately 28 seconds

segments.scene_description: The camera continues walking forward through the great hall, moving deeper into the space. The stone pillar on the right recedes into the mid-ground while the fireplace on the left wall comes closer. Another student crosses the foreground from right to left. The floating candles remain overhead and the enchanted ceiling continues to show the night sky with moving clouds.

scene_state.functional_zone: far end of great hall near the head table

agents.ego_description: slowly approaching the far end of the hall while observing the architecture and floating candles

entered.detail: arched stone doorway visible on the right side at the far end of the hall

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the far end of the great hall, having passed the large stone pillar. The fireplace on the left is now in the near-ground, and a stone archway becomes visible on the right at the far end. The floating candles continue to illuminate the space from above, and students remain seated at the tables. The enchanted ceiling shows swirling night clouds throughout.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward glide through a vast gothic great hall, moving from the wide entrance toward the far end of the chamber. It begins by walking down the central aisle beneath an enchanted night sky and hundreds of floating candles, as a student in dark robes crosses the foreground. As the camera pushes deeper into the space, the massive stone pillars recede while the large fireplace on the left wall draws closer, with another student passing through the frame. The scene then shifts as the camera passes the primary pillar, bringing the fireplace into the near-ground and revealing a stone archway at the far end of the hall. Finally, the movement concludes as the camera approaches the distant architecture under the swirling clouds of the enchanted ceiling.
